The policy requires that the maximum number of retry attempts for any operation should not exceed three. This is to prevent infinite loops and ensure system stability.
The policy requires setting the maximum number of retry attempts to 3. This change needs to be enforced across all relevant systems and configurations to ensure compliance with the new rule.

How are source artifacts synced to S3 and materialized back to disk (git bundle)?
How are async jobs stored and claimed from Postgres (SKIP LOCKED)?
How does RabbitMQ publishing work and how does the worker consume messages?
Where does the worker dispatch job types to prepareRepo/ingestGitHistory/indexProject?
How does scan_workspace detect modified/untracked/staged files in a local git workspace?

Which migration creates project_sources, project_workspaces, workspace_deltas, async_jobs?

Where do our clients parse MCP tool outputs that may contain summary+json (auto_both)?
How are boolean environment variables parsed safely?
Where are MCP tools registered and which modules implement them?
How does the server apply SQL migrations on startup?
Where is the Postgres connection pool created and reused?
Where are guardrails stored and how are triggers matched?
Where does distillation affect lesson creation, summary, and conflict suggestions?
How do we validate LLM output schema for commit-to-lesson suggestions?
How does list_jobs filter by correlation_id and why is it important for per-run reporting?
Where do we assert/bind RabbitMQ queues and what routing keys are used?
How does the worker start a RabbitMQ consumer and ack/nack messages?
Does the worker still poll Postgres as a fallback and where is that loop implemented?
When repo.sync succeeds, where do we enqueue git.ingest and index.run and propagate correlation_id?
What is the schema for project_sources and how does it support remote_git and local_workspace?
What table stores workspace deltas and what fields capture modified/untracked/staged files?
How does scan_workspace optionally trigger delta indexing?
When delete_workspace is called, which tables are cleared for phase 5/6 features?
How are deterministic IDs generated for KG nodes and symbols?
How are lessons linked to code symbols in Neo4j and what heuristics are used?
How do we delete graph data for a project (cleanup)?
How does analyze_commit_impact combine changed files with KG symbol/lesson links?
How does link_commit_to_lesson update lesson source_refs and refresh symbol links?
Where do we sanitize source_refs to avoid [object Object] and ensure determinism?
Where is the health endpoint implemented and what does it return?
What is the default output_format behavior and how is auto_both constructed?
How does DEFAULT_PROJECT_ID work and where is it applied when project_id is omitted?
Where do we load .env and validate environment variables at startup?
Where is EMBEDDINGS_BASE_URL used to call the OpenAI-compatible embeddings API?
Where is EMBEDDINGS_API_KEY read and sent to the embeddings server?

Where is the workspace token configured (CONTEXT_HUB_WORKSPACE_TOKEN) and checked?
Where are chunk sizes/overlap configured for indexing (and what defaults are used)?
Where is search_code implemented and how do semantic/lexical/KG boosts combine?
What default excludes are applied in search_code (tests, __tests__, smoke)?
